hooks.command: sid=$(jq -r '.session_id // empty'); r="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$PWD}"; d="$r/.cache"; marker="$d/wiki-pulled-$sid"; mkdir -p "$d"; find "$d" -name 'wiki-pulled-*' -mtime +1 -delete 2>/dev/null; [ -z "$sid" ] || [ -n "$(find "$marker" -mmin -10 2>/dev/null)" ] || { git -C "$r" pull --rebase --autostash 2>&1 && touch "$marker"; } || true
